headline: Invesco’s SPHD Pays 4.57% While the S&P 500 Pays 0.98%, And It Is Up This Year Without the Tech Bubble Risk

headline: Virtus (VRTS) Moves 8.8% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Virtus (VRTS) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
